results.title: Shop hook spring latches - Amazon® Official Site
results.snippet: Browse & discover thousands of brands. Read customer reviews & find best sellers. Find deals and low prices on hook spring latches at Amazon.com

results.title: Spring-Loaded Latches | McMaster-Carr
results.snippet: Choose from our selection of spring-loaded latches, including slide-bolt locks and latches, push-to-close latches, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.

results.title: Hook Latches - McMaster-Carr
results.snippet: Choose from our selection of spring latch kits, swinging hook latches, spring safety latch kits, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.

results.title: Spring Latches | McMaster-Carr
results.snippet: Choose from our selection of slide-bolt locks and latches, push-to-close latches, draw locks and latches, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.

results.title: Spring Latches GN 724.1 | Ganter
results.snippet: Spring latches GN 724.1 have a plunger pin with square cross-section, a latching surface on one side and a chamfer on the other. When moving in the direction of the chamfered pin, the plunger pin passes over grooves and edges, as the chamfered pin moves the plunger pin into the guide.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latches - Maxum Hardware
results.snippet: Spring-loaded latches can be used for a variety of applications, including on shipping containers, steel returnable packaging racks, trailers, agricultural equipment, and horse trailers and gates.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latch Pins | McMaster-Carr
results.snippet: Choose from our selection of spring loaded latch pins, including retractable long-nose spring plungers, locking quick-release pins, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latches - Guden - Page 1
results.snippet: The spring latch is made up of several components like clips, a single leaf, pins and springs which are all also available below. Each spring latch has a spring-loaded retactable pin with a bent end to easily open or close a door, lid, cover or gate with ease.

results.title: Amazon.com: Spring Loaded Latch Pin
results.snippet: Automatic spring-loaded mechanism on these latch pins provides easy, one-handed operation. Ideal for securing doors, cabinets, trailers, and other enclosures.

results.title: 30-670SS | Spring Loaded Toggle Latch | Medium Duty | Protex
results.snippet: The 30-670SS is a spring loaded over centre toggle fastener from the Protex medium duty toggle latch range manufactured from type 304 stainless steel.
